semantic.role: Public facade module providing a stable import surface for prompt policy constants, LLM mode enumerations, and their parsing/resolution utilities.
responsibilities: Exports public constants defining LLM operational modes, prompt policy tiers, validation policies, and budget profiles.
Exports parsing functions (parseLLMMode, parsePromptPolicyTier, parseRelevanceDiagnosticsMode, parseValidatePolicy) to convert raw strings into typed enumerations.
Exports resolution functions (resolvePromptPolicyTier, resolveValidatePolicy) to determine appropriate policies for given contexts.
Exports helper functions (defaultPromptTierForTask, defaultValidatePolicyForTask) to provide default configurations based on task type.
outOfScope: Prompt artifact generation or orchestration logic.
Direct implementation of parsing or resolution algorithms.
invariants: Must remain a pure re-export facade without internal logic.
Must not absorb service/task/engine orchestration concerns.
Must provide a stable import surface for callers needing only policy constants and parsing utilities.

changeIntent.architecturalIntent: Establish a lightweight facade for policy constants and parsing utilities, separating them from broader prompt context concerns to reduce import overhead and improve modularity.
changeIntent.recentChangeIntent: Refactor to establish subsystem facades and resolve layer inversions, aligning with the commit intent to clarify architectural boundaries.
